description_long: This object consists of a large group of identical post-mounted triangular traffic signs, each with a white background, red border, and various black pictograms or symbols indicating different road warnings. The signs are arranged in a grid pattern, with each sign mounted on a metallic gray post. The triangular faces are oriented to be easily visible from the front, and the signs display a variety of standard road warning symbols such as curves, intersections, pedestrian crossings, and other cautionary icons. The posts appear to be made of metal, providing sturdy support for the signs. The overall structure is visually striking due to the repetition and uniformity of the signs, making it highly noticeable in an urban environment.
description: A grid of post-mounted triangular traffic warning signs with red borders and various black pictograms, each supported by a metallic post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all the triangular signs with their distinct warning symbols clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the signs and the arrangement of the posts in parallel rows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the triangular signs and the uniformity of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin edges of the signs and the grid layout.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Various black road warning symbols such as curves, intersections, pedestrian crossings, and other cautionary icons.
